notes: Digilent HS3 was reconnected and JTAG detect reported xc7k480t IDCODE 0x23751093.
openFPGALoader programmed the reconstructed v9984 bitstream successfully; status reported isc_done=1 init=1 done=1.
Direct FTDI IDCODE readback required --tdo-bit 7 and then matched 0x23751093.
Selftest JTAG payload readback returned all zeros because the exact routed v9984 top has ENABLE_JTAG_DEBUG=0, so the BSCANE2 debug block is not instantiated.
Functional pass/fail for this specific image is therefore visible only through led_3bits_tri_o unless a JTAG-debug-enabled v9984 image is built and routed.
User visual observation after programming: LED0 green on, LED1 red blinking, LED2 on, LED3 off.
Assuming LED0 green is board power/status and LED1-LED3 correspond to led_3bits_tri_o[0:2], the observed pattern is blink/pass/fail = blinking/on/off, which matches SELFTEST_PASS.
